name: rein context-effort benchmark
description: Twenty realistic software tasks scored by how much repo context the same agent inspects with and without rein memory.

model.filesInspected: Unique files mentioned by search hits, full reads, git history, diffs, test failures, or perf traces.
model.time: Estimated agent context-discovery seconds from the replayed trajectory, not machine wall-clock.
model.hardPerformanceChecks: Objective pass/fail grading from repeated samples against each task performance threshold; medians are reported,.

tasks.prompt: Fix users being logged out after a token refresh race.
tasks.performanceTarget: No extra auth round trip during normal page navigation.

tasks.prompt: Fix one-cent checkout total mismatches for discounted subscriptions.
tasks.performanceTarget: Pricing calculation remains O(line items) and avoids duplicate tax calls.

tasks.prompt: Reduce feed API latency caused by per-post author lookups.
tasks.performanceTarget: p95 feed render under 120 ms for 100 posts.

tasks.prompt: Add a non-null account_id to events without breaking old imports.
tasks.performanceTarget: Backfill processes 50k rows without table-wide locks.

tasks.prompt: Stop large image uploads from spiking memory.
tasks.performanceTarget: Peak RSS stays under 256 MB for a 20 MB upload.

tasks.prompt: Fix mobile navigation closing during hydration.
tasks.performanceTarget: No added client bundle over 2 KB gzip.

tasks.prompt: Fix exact title matches being ranked below body-only matches.
tasks.performanceTarget: Search p95 stays under 80 ms for 10k docs.

tasks.prompt: Prevent duplicate emails when a retry races with a scheduled job.
tasks.performanceTarget: Worker throughput stays above 1k jobs/min.

tasks.prompt: Handle quoted newlines in uploaded CSV imports.
tasks.performanceTarget: Import 100k rows without loading the whole file in memory.

tasks.prompt: Fix rate limiting bypass for rotated IPv6 addresses.
tasks.performanceTarget: Limiter check stays below 1 ms per request.

tasks.prompt: Invalidate article cache when authors change display names.
tasks.performanceTarget: No full-site cache clear for a single author update.

tasks.prompt: Make beta flags default off in production but on in preview.
tasks.performanceTarget: Flag lookup remains single read per request.

tasks.prompt: Make payment webhooks idempotent across provider retries.
tasks.performanceTarget: Webhook handler remains below 50 ms on duplicate events.

tasks.prompt: Fix modal focus escaping behind the overlay.
tasks.performanceTarget: No extra render loop or global document scan on each keypress.

tasks.prompt: Fix duplicate rows across cursor-paginated pages.
tasks.performanceTarget: Pagination remains index-backed for 1M rows.

tasks.prompt: Resolve offline edits without overwriting newer server content.
tasks.performanceTarget: Sync of 1k notes stays linear.

tasks.prompt: Prevent email addresses from leaking into structured logs.
tasks.performanceTarget: Redaction stays under 5 percent logging overhead.

tasks.prompt: Rename spacing tokens without breaking consumers.
tasks.performanceTarget: Build time and generated CSS size do not increase.

tasks.prompt: Stop large CSV exports from timing out HTTP requests.
tasks.performanceTarget: Export 100k rows asynchronously under the queue SLA.

tasks.prompt: Fix presence subscriptions leaking after tab close.
tasks.performanceTarget: Memory returns to baseline after 500 join/leave cycles.
